description.value: The creature exudes a terrifying aura. All characters within X metres of it must make a Challenging (+0) Willpower test at the start of their turn or suffer a –10 penalty to all tests until the start of their next turn. X represents the range in metres of this aura.

system.benefit: All characters within X metres must pass a Challenging (+0) Willpower test or suffer –10 to all tests until their next turn. X is the range in metres.
